result.stdout:
Usage:
  mgcb-editor [options] [<project>]

Arguments:
  <project>    The path to a .mgcb file.

Options:
  -r, --register      Register MGCB Editor as the default application for .mgcb files for the current user, replacing any previous registration.
  -u, --unregister    Unregister MGCB Editor as the default application for .mgcb files for the current user.
  -v, --version       Show version information.
  -?, -h, --help      Show help and usage information
